body.title: Bliss-alignment signal — slow integrator on Pursuit completions, feeds milieu
body.result: Stage 1 bliss integrator: EMA over Pursuit completion events (30min window), feeds back to milieu as valence floor-lift + dominance bump. μ-opioid liking counterpart to dopamine wanting (Berridge-Kringelbach). bliss_integrator.py + milieu.ingest_bliss_lift() + 13 unit tests + pursuit_layer doc update. Gated on IGOR_BLISS_ENABLED (default false). Stage 2 (persistent-goal alignment weighting) deferred to follow-up gated on T-goal-formation-from-conversation. Commit aca00849.
body.description:
Bliss-alignment signal — derived from Pursuit completions, feeds back into milieu. Framing 2 per 2026-04-22 design chat: not a new milieu axis, but a slow integrator (EMA over a sustained window) over Pursuit completion dopamine events. Biology: μ-opioid 'liking' is slow and separable from dopamine 'wanting' — bliss is the liking-side counterpart to the fast commitment/completion dopamine we already fire from Pursuit.

Proposed shape: cognition/bliss_integrator.py subscribes to pursuit DopamineEvent stream, maintains EMA of completion-magnitude over configurable window (default 30min). Exposes get_bliss() -> float in [0,1]. A small periodic feedback into milieu lifts valence floor and bumps dominance baseline when bliss is high — matching the training-signal story ('milieu wants you to do more of that'). Stage 1 (this ticket): integrator on completion events alone. Stage 2 (follow-up, gated on T-goal-formation-from-conversation): weight completions by alignment with persistent goals, so bliss reflects *meaningful* completion, not just completion volume.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/cognition/bliss_integrator.py (new); wild_igor/igor/cognition/milieu.py (small read of bliss + apply); tests/test_bliss_integrator.py (new); lab/design_docs/pursuit_layer.md (add §Integration bullet).

**Design rules:** no-sqlite (use in-process state or Postgres — likely in-process EMA is fine); test-plan-or-why-not.

**Scope boundary:** IN: bliss integrator subscribing to pursuit events, EMA state, get_bliss(), milieu feedback hook gated on IGOR_BLISS_ENABLED. OUT: persistent-goal alignment weighting (Stage 2); UI/dashboard surfacing; adding a 4th VAD axis (Framing 1 rejected).

**Test plan:** unit tests for EMA behavior (spikes decay, repeated completions sustain), subscription to pursuit events (spawn+complete → bliss rises), disabled-gate fallback (no-op), milieu feedback applies valence floor-lift only when enabled. Integration test: run a sequence of 5 Pursuit completions, assert bliss > baseline, assert decay after idle window.
